title: gazal #1497
definition:
1) to tear away, seize, plunder, tear off, pull off, rob, take away
    by force
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to tear away, rob
        1a2) to seize, plunder (with acc cognate)
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be robbed
        1b2) to be taken away
nasbUsage:

    by force
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to tear away, rob
        1a2) to seize, plunder (with acc cognate)
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be robbed
        1b2) to be taken away

    NASB:  to tear away, seize, rob
